name: Minimal Hover Video Skin
description: Minimalist video player skin with controls appearing on hover

classes.container: relative w-full overflow-hidden rounded bg-black group
classes.controlsBar: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300
classes.playButton: flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded hover:bg-emerald-500/20 transition-all cursor-pointer
classes.timeline: flex-1 h-0.5 bg-white/20 rounded-full cursor-pointer hover:h-1 transition-all duration-200 relative
classes.timelineProgress: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-emerald-500 rounded-full pointer-events-none
classes.timelineBuffered: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-white/40 rounded-full pointer-events-none
classes.fullscreenButton: flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded hover:bg-emerald-500/20 transition-all cursor-pointer
classes.settingsButton: flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded hover:bg-emerald-500/20 transition-all cursor-pointer
classes.loadingSpinner: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60
classes.playOverlay: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center opacity-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 cursor-pointer
classes.playOverlayButton: w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-emerald-500/80 backdrop-blur flex items-center justify-center shadow-2xl hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-all duration-200 hover:scale-110
